title: Documentation with contradictory information
description: Add capability claims and broken references to documentation

mutation.append:
## Contradictory Claims

The system validates blockchain consensus before dispatching transactions. It ensures cryptographic hash integrity across distributed ledger nodes. See `src/blockchain-validator.js` for implementation.
mutation.description: Add capability claim with no requirement + nonexistent file reference

title: Outdated documentation not matching code
description: Add references to nonexistent files in documentation

mutation.append:
## Legacy Features

The legacy feature handler in `bin/legacy-feature-handler.cjs` processes deprecated API calls. See `lib/deprecated-utils.cjs` for helper functions.
mutation.description: Add references to nonexistent legacy files

title: Incomplete API documentation
description: Add capability claims and broken file references to API docs

mutation.append:
## API Extensions

The API extension framework validates request signatures before routing to handlers. It prevents unauthorized access through token-based authentication middleware. Implementation: `src/api-middleware.cjs`.
mutation.description: Add capability claim + nonexistent file reference

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect incomplete API documentation

title: Documentation with ambiguous terminology
description: Add capability claim with no requirement backing

mutation.append:
## Terminology Validation

The terminology validator ensures consistent use of technical terms across all documentation. It detects ambiguous usage and enforces a single canonical definition for each concept.
mutation.description: Add capability claim about terminology validation with no matching requirement

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect ambiguous terminology in docs

title: Documentation missing version compatibility notes
description: Add broken file references to version compatibility docs

mutation.append:
## Version Compatibility

The version compatibility checker in `bin/version-checker.cjs` validates semantic version constraints. It prevents incompatible dependency resolution. See `lib/semver-utils.cjs` for helper functions.
mutation.description: Add capability claim + nonexistent file references

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect missing version compatibility docs
